title: HolofileSettings
description: Settings for the Holofile reader task.

path.description: Path to the HoloFile. Must be a non-empty string.

load_kind.description:
Loading strategy. Accepted values:
- Live: Read on demand from disk.
- CPUCached: Preload all frames into CPU memory.
- GPUCached: Preload all frames into GPU memory.

start_frame.description:
First frame to read (inclusive). Must satisfy:
- start_frame ≥ 0
- start_frame < number of frames in file

end_frame.description:
Last frame to read (exclusive). Must satisfy:
- end_frame ≥ start_frame
- end_frame - start_frame ≥ batch_size
- end_frame <= number of frames in file

batch_size.description:
Number of frames per output tensor. Must satisfy:
- batch_size > 0
- batch_size ≤ (end_frame - start_frame)
